content: We can reframe Self-Refine as a 'single-perspective foundational self-correction layer' that can be stacked with multiple-perspective LLM self-reflection mechanisms to create a hierarchical self-improvement pipeline, where Self-Refine resolves local output flaws before multi-perspective reflection challenges fundamental reasoning biases. This hybrid pipeline retains Self-Refine's key advantage of requiring no extra training or supervision while gaining the deeper error detection capabilities of multi-perspective reflection.
